title: ShulkerNames
description: A plugin that displays the name of the installed shulker above it
body:
Plugin for Paper that automatically displays the name of the shalker box above it if it has been renamed on the anvil.
### Features:
- Shows the shulker box name using an TextDisplay
- Works only for shulkers renamed by the player
- Automatically removes the name when the shulker is broken
### Usage:
- Rename a shulker box in an anvil
- Place it — its name appears above
- Break the box — the name disappears
